items.name: geo
items.title: geo
items.description: Bearing math for world-anchored components (DirectionArrow, Compass).

items.name: utils
items.title: utils
items.description: Merge class names the shadcn way: clsx joins conditionals, tailwind-merge de-dupes conflicting Tailwind utilities so a consumer's `className` override wins (e.g.

items.name: assistant-orb
items.title: AssistantOrb
items.description: the Meta-AI presence: a glowing gradient orb that animates per `state` (idle = gentle breathe, listening = pulse, thinking = swirl, speaking = quick pulse).

items.name: async-view
items.title: AsyncView
items.description: the four-state async renderer every data screen needs: placeholder (idle) → loading → success/error.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: a contact / sender avatar: shows a photo when you have one, else an icon, else initials on a gradient plate.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: a small count or status pill (notification counts, live state).

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: a D-pad-focusable action.

items.name: call-card
items.title: CallCard
items.description: an incoming / active call: a big avatar, caller name, a status line ("Incoming…", "02:14"), and an action row (accept / decline via D-pad-focusable <Button>s).

items.name: chat-bubble
items.title: ChatBubble
items.description: one message.

items.name: clock
items.title: Clock
items.description: the home time/date complication: a big tabular time and a quieter date line.

items.name: compass
items.title: Compass
items.description: a heading rose that keeps North pointing at real north while a fixed top marker shows where you face.

items.name: compose-flow
items.title: ComposeFlow
items.description: the working text-entry recipe for a platform with no keyboard or microphone: a focusable field that opens a picker of choices when activated; choosing writes the value back and returns to the field.

items.name: confirm
items.title: Confirm
items.description: a decision screen: a prompt + a two-button action bar (confirm / cancel).

items.name: deck
items.title: Deck
items.description: a horizontal paged flow (wizard / onboarding).

items.name: direction-arrow
items.title: DirectionArrow
items.description: points toward a real-world direction.

items.name: empty-state
items.title: EmptyState
items.description: the nothing-here screen: optional glyph + title + hint + one action.

items.name: error-state
items.title: ErrorState
items.description: a recoverable error screen: optional glyph + title + message + a retry action.

items.name: grid
items.title: Grid
items.description: an aligned, vertically-scrolling multi-column layout: every cell shares the same track, so rows and columns line up.

items.name: heading
items.title: Heading
items.description: a screen/section title with an optional eyebrow label above it.

items.name: icon
items.title: Icon
items.description: wraps any icon provider's SVG (Lucide, Tabler, or your own) and applies the lens icon styling.

items.name: launcher
items.title: Launcher
items.description: the app grid: a home screen of gradient app-icon plates + labels.

items.name: list
items.title: List
items.description: a vertical stack of focusable rows (watchOS list spirit) that fills the stage and scrolls (D-pad scrollIntoView).

items.name: map-view
items.title: MapView
items.description: a real, moving map for the lens, built on Leaflet (~42KB).

items.name: masonry
items.title: Masonry
items.description: a staggered, vertically-scrolling multi-column layout (the Pinterest / Photos gallery look, where columns do not line up).

items.name: media-thumb
items.title: MediaThumb
items.description: a photo / reel tile (Photos, Instagram).

items.name: messages
items.title: Messages
items.description: an inbox: a thread list and a conversation, replying through ComposeFlow on a keyboard-less platform.

items.name: meter
items.title: Meter
items.description: a bounded ring gauge for a level (battery, signal, intensity), as opposed to <Progress> which tracks task completion.

items.name: navigator
items.title: Navigator
items.description: a screen stack for glasses apps (react-navigation semantics, glasses-native mechanics).

items.name: notification-card
items.title: NotificationCard
items.description: an incoming notification (message, mention, alert): a leading avatar/glyph, sender + time, a message preview, and optional quick actions.

items.name: now-playing
items.title: NowPlaying
items.description: a media "now playing" card: album art, title + artist, a scrub bar, and elapsed / remaining times.

items.name: permission-prompt
items.title: PermissionPrompt
items.description: an explicit access request (sensors, location, camera, mic), which MRBD apps must ask for before use.

items.name: pin
items.title: Pin
items.description: a world-anchored waypoint marker: a ring + dot at a screen point with the name and distance stacked above.

items.name: pressable
items.title: Pressable
items.description: the focusable wrapper for custom UI.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: emitted progress, two shapes: - "linear" a continuous bar (also covers countdown: feed a decreasing value and a time label).

items.name: quick-reply-chips
items.title: QuickReplyChips
items.description: tappable canned replies (the comms job; there is no keyboard on the lens — text is voice).

items.name: readout
items.title: Readout
items.description: a single-value complication: label + value (+ optional unit).

items.name: screen
items.title: Screen
items.description: the on-lens layout shell: a status region (block-start), a centered stage (the one task), and the cue region (block-end).

items.name: segmented
items.title: Segmented
items.description: pick one of a few options (a watchOS-style segmented control).

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: a continuous level control (volume, brightness — the quick controls).

items.name: stat-grid
items.title: StatGrid
items.description: a compact grid of readouts for a multi-metric glance (a watch "complication cluster").

items.name: status-dot
items.title: StatusDot
items.description: a glanceable sensor / permission / connection indicator.

items.name: stepper
items.title: Stepper
items.description: adjust a value in discrete steps (glasses have no fine slider).

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: a top-level tab strip (the home's quick-controls | home | apps pager).

items.name: timer
items.title: Timer
items.description: a countdown readout: big tabular m:ss (h:mm:ss past an hour), an optional label, and a bar draining toward zero.

items.name: toaster
items.title: Toaster
items.description: the GlassKit toast / notification system, built on Sonner (Emil Kowalski's library) and themed to the lens surfaces.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: a binary switch, D-pad-focusable (renders a real button with the focusable class; useDpad activates it on Enter/Space).

items.name: weather-tile
items.title: WeatherTile
items.description: a glanceable weather complication: a condition glyph + big temperature, the condition text, and an optional location / hi-lo line.

items.name: workout
items.title: Workout
items.description: a fitness companion: a workout list, a live session, and a rest timer, composed from Navigator, Timer, and a destructive Confirm.
